pi_items.source: Explicitly defined in verifier.py as NY_LAT_RAD = 0.7105
Explicitly defined in verifier.py as NY_LON_RAD = -1.2916
task.json description, export_result.sh (PRESENTATION_NOTES variable), and verifier.py

privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring Stellarium to simulate New York City, targeting coordinates 0.7105 radians latitude and -1.2916 radians longitude, matching the verifier scripts. The agent is required to write a presentation outline to /home/ga/Desktop/dark_sky_presentation.txt and save screenshots to /home/ga/Pictures/stellarium. No synthetic data is injected; the task relies on Stellarium's default real-world astronomical database.
